blended.narrative: Big Sky is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,031 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 56".
